individual_scores.name: Room measurement guide
individual_scores.description: Interactive tool to measure and visualize your workspace dimensions and layout options

individual_scores.name: Lighting assessment checklist
individual_scores.description: Guide to evaluate natural light, identify glare issues, and plan artificial lighting

individual_scores.name: L-shaped desk configuration
individual_scores.description: Corner desk layout maximizing space efficiency, recommended for small rooms

individual_scores.name: Standing desk converter option
individual_scores.description: Space-saving solution that converts existing surface to sit-stand workspace

individual_scores.name: Flexispot E7 Standing Desk
individual_scores.description: Electric height adjustable desk, 120x60cm, programmable presets, excellent stability, $549

individual_scores.name: IKEA BEKANT
individual_scores.description: Manual crank height adjustable, 160x80cm, simple design, good value, $449

individual_scores.name: Autonomous SmartDesk Pro
individual_scores.description: Dual motor standing desk, 150x75cm, anti-collision, 4 memory settings, $699

individual_scores.name: Herman Miller Aeron (Refurbished)
individual_scores.description: Premium ergonomic mesh chair, fully adjustable, 12-year warranty, $599 refurbished

individual_scores.name: Secretlab Titan Evo
individual_scores.description: Gaming-style ergonomic chair, magnetic headrest, 4D armrests, good lumbar, $449

individual_scores.name: Branch Ergonomic Chair
individual_scores.description: Modern design, 7 adjustment points, breathable mesh, 7-year warranty, $349

individual_scores.name: LG 27UK850-W 4K Monitor
individual_scores.description: 27-inch 4K IPS, USB-C connectivity, HDR10, height adjustable stand, $449

individual_scores.name: Dell UltraSharp U2720Q
individual_scores.description: 27-inch 4K USB-C hub monitor, factory calibrated, daisy chain support, $529

individual_scores.name: VIVO Dual Monitor Arm
individual_scores.description: Heavy-duty desk mount for 2 monitors up to 32-inch, full motion, cable management, $39

individual_scores.name: Logitech MX Keys
individual_scores.description: Low-profile wireless keyboard, backlit, multi-device switching, USB-C charging, $99

individual_scores.name: Logitech MX Master 3
individual_scores.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse, customizable buttons, fast scrolling, USB-C, $99

individual_scores.name: Keychron K3 Mechanical
individual_scores.description: Ultra-slim mechanical keyboard, hot-swappable, wireless, Mac/Windows compatible, $84

individual_scores.name: TP-Link AX3000 WiFi 6 Router
individual_scores.description: Dual-band WiFi 6, covers up to 185sqm, easy mesh, $129

individual_scores.name: Anker USB-C Hub 7-in-1
individual_scores.description: HDMI, USB-A, SD card, ethernet port, compact design, $45

individual_scores.name: Cable management kit
individual_scores.description: Under-desk cable tray, velcro ties, cable sleeves, complete organization solution, $35

individual_scores.name: BenQ ScreenBar Plus
individual_scores.description: Monitor-mounted LED light bar, auto-dimming, asymmetric optics prevents screen glare, $129

individual_scores.name: Philips Hue Desk Lamp
individual_scores.description: Smart LED desk lamp, adjustable color temperature, app control, $79

individual_scores.name: Sony WH-1000XM4
individual_scores.description: Premium ANC headphones, 30-hour battery, excellent call quality, comfortable, $278

individual_scores.name: Acoustic foam panels set
individual_scores.description: 12-pack sound absorbing panels, easy install, reduces echo and ambient noise, $45

individual_scores.name: Ergonomic footrest
individual_scores.description: Adjustable angle footrest, improves posture, reduces leg fatigue, $39

individual_scores.name: Anti-fatigue standing mat
individual_scores.description: Cushioned mat for standing desk use, beveled edges, easy to clean, $59

individual_scores.name: Monitor riser with storage
individual_scores.description: Bamboo desk organizer, raises monitor to eye level, built-in storage, $35

individual_scores.name: Mezze platter recipe
individual_scores.description: Hummus, baba ganoush, tzatziki with pita bread and vegetables - serves 8, prep 45min

individual_scores.name: Caprese skewers
individual_scores.description: Cherry tomatoes, mozzarella, basil with balsamic glaze - vegetarian, serves 8, prep 20min

individual_scores.name: Herb-crusted lamb rack
individual_scores.description: Mediterranean spiced lamb with roasted vegetables - serves 4-5, 90min total

individual_scores.name: Stuffed bell peppers
individual_scores.description: Quinoa, feta, sun-dried tomato filling - vegetarian, serves 4, can prep day before

individual_scores.name: Greek lemon potatoes
individual_scores.description: Crispy roasted potatoes with oregano - side dish for both mains, serves 8

individual_scores.name: Baklava
